description: Composition Black trousers made of a polyester/viscose blend, has a flat front, two side pockets, two back pockets with button closures, comfortable waistband with belt loops, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fit Classic Wash care Delicate cold wash Hang to dry in shade Iron with medium heat Do not bleach Take formal dressing to the next level in this pair of polyviscose trousers from turtle. The fabric falls neatly, offering all day comfort. Pair it with a crisp formal shirt, a blazer, stylish cufflinks and leather shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' waist 32" and hips 40"
